title: Prediction Market Economy ranking
source_note: Top 30 EVM chains by TVL from DeFiLlama snapshot 2026-03-07. Atlas publishes source-backed metrics when available and preserves the last valid snapshot otherwise.

modules.name: Oracle Layer
modules.rationale: Outcome resolution support is strong enough that markets can settle against trusted external signals without major chain-level blockers.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, oracle resolution infrastructure is treated as available for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.name: Market Contracts
modules.rationale: Reusable market creation and position logic are already strong enough to support prediction builders without foundational rework.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, market contract infrastructure is treated as available for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.name: Indexing Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Market and position data are already queryable enough to support discovery, analytics, and operational monitoring.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, indexing infrastructure is treated as available for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.name: Liquidity Integration
modules.rationale: The chain has enough liquidity support to help active markets sustain tighter pricing and deeper participation.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, liquidity support is treated as available for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.rationale: Outcome resolution support is strong enough that markets can settle against trusted external signals without major chain-level blockers.

modules.rationale: Without reusable market contracts, builders must recreate too much of the core prediction stack before they can launch.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Plume, market contract infrastructure is treated as missing for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.name: Indexing Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Searchable market state exists, but it still needs more structure before prediction products can rely on it with less custom work.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Plume, indexing infrastructure is treated as partially available for the prediction-market benchmark.

modules.name: Liquidity Integration
modules.rationale: Without stronger liquidity rails, prediction markets remain thinner and produce weaker price signals across the ecosystem.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Plume, liquidity support is treated as missing for the prediction-market benchmark.
